suggestions.title: App.jsx is 1020 lines — needs component extraction
suggestions.description: App.jsx has grown to 1020 lines. StatsBar, WorkerCard, ActivityLog, ProgressBar, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton should all be separate files. This is the 6th time I'm flagging this. It's becoming a maintenance nightmare — any change risks breaking unrelated features.

suggestions.title: workerHistory key={i} causes React reconciliation bugs
suggestions.description: In WorkerCard's back face, workerHistory entries use key={i} (line index). When new activity arrives, React may reuse DOM nodes incorrectly causing stale text. Use key={e.timestamp + e.type + e.worker} instead.

suggestions.title: vibeStreak useEffect writes sessionStorage every poll cycle
suggestions.description: The vibe streak effect runs on every teamVibe.key change, but also writes to sessionStorage on every sync even when the key hasn't changed (because it re-reads and increments). This means every 30s poll bumps the streak counter incorrectly. The streak should only increment on actual vibe transitions, not re-renders with the same vibe.

suggestions.title: Confetti timer stacking — no cleanup on rapid vibe changes
suggestions.description: Both confettiActive and workerConfetti use setTimeout without storing/clearing refs. Rapid vibe transitions or multiple workers shipping simultaneously will stack confetti layers. Use refs to cancel pending timeouts.

suggestions.title: R-key sync shortcut fires inside contentEditable and IME composition
suggestions.description: The keydown handler checks for INPUT/TEXTAREA tags but not contentEditable elements or IME composing state (e.isComposing). Users typing in rich text fields or using CJK input methods will accidentally trigger syncs.

suggestions.title: WorkerCard and StatsBar still not wrapped in React.memo
suggestions.description: WorkerCard re-renders on every poll cycle for all cards even when data hasn't changed. StatsBar also re-renders unnecessarily. CharacterAvatar was memo'd (good!), but the parent components that actually receive the workers array weren't. This is the 9th flag.

suggestions.title: completionToast blocks pointer events for 3 seconds
suggestions.description: The fixed-position completion toast has no pointer-events: none, so it blocks clicks on anything behind it (including the sync button). Add pointer-events: none to the toast container.

suggestions.title: No ErrorBoundary — white screen on any render crash
suggestions.description: If any component throws during render, the entire app white-screens. A root ErrorBoundary with a friendly fallback UI and retry button would prevent total failure. 6th flag.

suggestions.title: seenIdsRef never resets — grows unbounded across session
suggestions.description: seenIdsRef accumulates every worker ID ever seen and never clears. While unlikely to cause issues in practice (small team), it's a code smell. Consider clearing it when the component unmounts or on manual sync.

suggestions.title: StatsBar grid overflows on narrow viewports (< 480px)
suggestions.description: The 5-column grid in StatsBar doesn't collapse below 480px. On very small phones, stat cards get squished to unreadable widths. Should switch to 2-column or single-column at small breakpoints.

suggestions.title: footer tagline uses inline object literal — recreated every render
suggestions.description: The footer's vibe-to-quote mapping is an inline object literal inside JSX, recreated on every render. Extract to a const outside the component.

suggestions.title: No loading indicator on Office tab when data hasn't arrived yet
suggestions.description: The Office tab shows an empty floor with no workers and no loading state on first load. A skeleton or spinner would indicate that data is being fetched.
